---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
---

## Excercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

```

```{r}
setwd("/home/kreece/Patrick-Kristen/data")


lobster_traps <- read_csv("Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")

```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))

```

```{r}
not_napl <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE != "NAPL")

```

```{r}
carp_20_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE == "CARP" & TRAPS > 20)
```

## step 10.4 question 4

```{r}
carp_20_traps %>% 
  group_by(SITE,MONTH) %>% 
  summarize(max(TRAPS)) 
```
## Exercise:Data Visualization
```{r}
ggplot(data = lobster_traps, aes(x = TRAPS)) +
    geom_histogram() +
    facet_wrap( ~ YEAR)
```
### Question 6
```{r}
lobsters_traps_summarize <- lobster_traps %>% 
  group_by(SITE, YEAR) %>% 
  summarize(TOTAL_TRAPS = sum(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))
```
```{r}
# line plot
ggplot(data = lobsters_traps_summarize, aes(x = YEAR, y = TOTAL_TRAPS)) +
    geom_line(aes(color = SITE))

# line and point plot
ggplot(data = lobsters_traps_summarize, aes(x = YEAR, y = TOTAL_TRAPS)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = SITE)) +
    geom_line(aes(color = SITE))
```
### Question 7
```{r}
lobster_traps_fishing_pressure <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(YEAR %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021)) %>%
    mutate(FISHING_PRESSURE = if_else(TRAPS >= 8, true = "high", false = "low")) %>%
    group_by(SITE, FISHING_PRESSURE) %>%
    summarize(COUNT = n()) %>%
    drop_na()
```
### bar plot
```{r}
# bar plot
ggplot(data = lobster_traps_fishing_pressure, aes(x = SITE, y = COUNT, fill = FISHING_PRESSURE)) +
    geom_col() + theme_bw()
```
### dodged bar plot

```{r}
# dodged bar plot
ggplot(data = lobster_traps_fishing_pressure, aes(x = SITE, y = COUNT, fill = FISHING_PRESSURE)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data = lobster_traps_fishing_pressure,
       aes(x = SITE, y = COUNT, fill = FISHING_PRESSURE)) +
  
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
           width = 0.7,
           color = "black") +     # adds bar borders
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#1b9e77", "#d95f02")) +  # custom colors
  
  labs(title = "Lobster Trap Counts by Site and Fishing Pressure",
       x = "Site",
       y = "Number of Traps",
       fill = "Fishing Pressure") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```


The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
